cx-javascript: Qalabkani ma shaqeeyo JavaScript la'aan. JavaScript waa naafoobay, wuu shaqayn waayay, ama biraawsarkan lama taageero.
cx-specialpage-enable-betafeature: [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Content_translation Turjumaadda Mawduuca] waa qalab kuu sahlaya inaad si degdeg ah bogag ugu turjunto luqaddaada. [$1 Isku day hadda!]
cx-license-agreement: Markaad sii waddo, waxaad ogolaanaysaa [https://foundation.wikimedia.org/wiki/Terms_of_Use Shuruudaha Isticmaalka], sidoo kale waxaad si aan laga noqosho lahayn ugu raacsan tahay in wax ku biirintaada lagu sii daayo shatiyada [https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/ CC BY-SA 4.0] iyo [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Text_of_the_GNU_Free_Documentation_License GFDL 1.3].
cx-error-server-connection: Qalad: Suurtagal maaha inaad ku xiranto serverka.
cx-desc: Ka dhig wax fudud [[Special:ContentTranslation|translate]] nuxurK bogogga
cx-publish-error-abuse-filter: Shaandhooyinka tafatirka ee otomaatiga ah ayaa aqoonsaday waxyaabo dhibaato leh oo ku jira turjumaaddaada. Shaandhada la helay: $1
cx-publish-error-empty: Serfar ku wax xog ah kama soo celin.
cx-publish-error-readonly: Wax tafatir ah laguma oggola wiki-ga.
cx-publish-error-spam-blacklist: Waxyaabo loo malaynayo inay yihiin spam ayaa laga helay turjumaaddaada. Faahfaahin: $1
cx-publish-error-title-blacklist: Cinwaanka aad qortay wuxuu ku jiraa liiska mamnuuca. Fadlan dooro magac kale oo loogu talagalay turjumaaddaada.
cx-publish-error-unknown: Khalad aan la garanayn oo aan la sixi karin ayaa dhacay. Faahfaahinta khaladka: $1
cx-lost-session-draft: Kulankaagii wuu dhacay. Tafatirradaada lama keydin karo ilaa aad mar kale ka soo gasho daaqad kale.
cx-lost-session-publish: Kulankaagii wuu dhacay. Ma daabici kartid turjumaadda ilaa aad mar kale ka soo gasho daaqad kale.
cx-translation-target-page-exists: Bog wata ciwaankaan [$1 $2] waa uu ku jiraa eikiga. U dooro bogga ciwaan ka gadisan.
tag-contenttranslation-description: Waxa ku jira waxaa lagu turjumay luqad kale iyadoo la adeegsaday qalabka turjumaadda.
tag-contenttranslation-v2-description: Nuxurkan waxaa laga turjumay luqad kale iyadoo la adeegsanayo nooca 2aad ee qalabka Turjumaadda Mawduuca.
tag-sectiontranslation-description: Nuxurkan waxaa laga turjumay qayb ku qoran luqad kale iyadoo la adeegsanayo astaanta Turjumaadda Qaybaha ee qalabka Turjumaadda Mawduuca.
tag-contenttranslation-high-unmodified-m: Turjumaadda lagu daabacay ContentTranslation waxay leedahay boqolkiiba sare oo ah turjumaad mashiin ah oo aan wax badan laga beddelin
cx-beta-desc: Qalabka turjumidda degdegga ah ee bogagga ee luqadaada. Ka biloow turjumidda [[Special:MyContributions|wax qoristaada bogga]], ee ku bedel wax bedelahayn side-by-side ee loo qaabeeyay turjumaadda. Qaar ka mid ah qalabkaas waxaa laga yaabaa in laga heli karo oo kaliya luqado gaar ah.
cx-entrypoint-dialog-page-doesnt-exist-y: Boggaan $1 kuma jiro weli. Ma {{GENDER:|doonaysaa}} inaad samayso?
cx-entrypoint-dialog-desc: Waxaad ka caawin kartaa Wikipedia adigoo turjumaya boggan. Turjumaaddu waa hab fudud oo lagu abuuro nuxur cusub oo ku qoran luqaddaada.
cx-campaign-newbytranslation-notice: Abuur maqaal cusub adigoo ka turjumaya luqad kale oo aad taqaan.
cx-campaign-newbytranslation-search: Raadi bog kale oo la turjumi karo
cx-special-login-error: Waa inaad soo gashaa si aad u turjunto boggan. [$1 Soo gal]
cx-tools-instructions-text3: {{GENDER:|Ka dhig}} qoraalka mid u akhrisama si dabiici ah
cx-tools-instructions-text4: Turjumaadd aaladeed waa mid wax tar leh  laakiin waa in {{GENDER:|aad}} saxdaa qaladaadka suurtagalka ah.
cx-tools-mt-use-source: Nuqul ka sameey qoraalka asalka ah
cx-tools-mt-noservices: Adeegyada turjumaadda looma hayo luuqadaha la doortay. [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:Content_translation/Translating/Initial_machine_translation Maxay tahay sababtu?]
cx-warning-unsaved-translation: Waxaad leedahay turjumaado aan la keydin.
cx-error-page-not-found: Bogga  "$1" ma laga heli karin $2 Wikipedia
cx-selected-source-page-error-page-and-t: Ciwaankaan horay baa loo adeegsaday [$1 $2] si [$3 ka bedelan bogga]
cx-selected-source-page-error-title-in-u: Ciwaanka boggaan cusub waa [$1 la adeegsaday mar hore]
cx-mt-abuse-error-title: Turjumaaddaadu {{PLURAL:$1|waxay ka kooban tahay}} guud ahaan $1% qoraal aan wax laga beddelin
cx-mt-abuse-error-sections: Turjumaaddaadu waxay ka kooban tahay qaybo muhiim ah oo qoraal ah oo aan wax laga beddelin
cx-mt-abuse-error-text:
Turjumaadda otomaatiga ah waa kaliya bilow. Hubi in nuxurka uu sax yahay oo uu si dabiici ah ugu qoran yahay luqaddaada.

Turjumaaddaada lama daabici karo adigoon wax ka sii beddelin.
cx-mt-abuse-warning-title: Qayb ka mid ah turjumaaddaada {{PLURAL:$1|waxay ka kooban tahay}} $1% qoraal aan wax laga beddelin
cx-mt-abuse-warning-text:
Turjumaadda otomaatiga ah waa kaliya bilow. Hubi in nuxurka uu sax yahay oo uu si dabiici ah ugu qoran yahay luqaddaada.

Turjumaaddaada waxay u badan tahay in la tirtiri doono marka ay dib u eegaan tifaftirayaasha kale.
cx-publish-captcha-title: Waxaa la hubinayaa inaad robot aadan ahayn
cx-captcha-unsupported-type: Nooc captcha ah oo aan la taageerin ayaa la helay.
cx-dashboard-sidebar-information: Ogoow macluumaadka dheeraadka ah ee qaabkaan
cx-save-draft-save-success: La keydiyay {{PLURAL:$1|daqiiqad ka hor|$1 daqiiqado ka hor|0=hadda uun}}
cx-save-draft-tooltip: Qabyada turjumaadda si toos ah ayaa loo kaydiyaa
cx-contributions-upload-tooltip: Soo geli sawirro, cod iyo muuqaal si loogu isticmaalo bogagga
cx-publishing-dialog-title: Ma rabtaa inaad dib u qorto bogga jira?
cx-publishing-with-issues-dialog-title: Ma rabtaa inaad daabacdo inkastoo ay jiraan dhibaatooyin jira?
cx-overwriting-with-issues: Turjumaaddaadu waxay ku beddeli doontaa bogga jira nuxur weli leh dhibaatooyin suurtagal ah. Fadlan ka fiirso khaladaadka ka hor intaadan daabicin.
cx-translation-already-in-progress: Tani waa turjumaad socda {{GENDER:$2|oo uu sameynayo}} $1. Marka turjumaad socoto, waxaad bilaabi kartaa mid cusub kaliya kadib hal maalin. Fadlan isku day mar kale 24 saacadood kadib ama la xiriir qofka bilaabay turjumaadda hadda socota.
cx-translation-already-in-progress-unkno: Tani waa turjumaad socota oo uu sameynayo isticmaale aan la garanayn. Marka turjumaad ay socoto, waxaad bilaabi kartaa mid cusub kaliya kadib hal maalin. Fadlan isku day 24 saacadood kadib ama la xiriir qofka bilaabay turjumaadda hadda socota.
cx-beta-feature-enabled-notification: Turjumaadda Mawduuca ayaa laga hawlgeliyay wiki-gan.
cx-init-critical-error: Cilad muhiim ah: Turjumaadda lama soo rari karin sababtoo ah khalad gudaha ah oo nidaamka ah.
cx-campaign-newarticle-notice: Abuurista bogag cusub adigoo turjumaya hadda way fududahay! Ma rabtaa inaad isku daydo aaladda beta ee Turjumaadda Mawduuca?
cx-no-target-categories: Ma jiraan qaybo. Tixgeli inaad ku darto qaybo si aad si fiican ugu kala saarto mawduuca.
cx-no-adapted-categories: Qaybaha asalka ah kuma jiraan luqaddan. Sahami qaybo kale si aad si fiican ugu sharaxdo mawduuca.
cx-tools-missing-link-text: {{GENDER:|Calaamadee}} bogga mid maqan si loo dhiirrigeliyo abuuristiisa.
echo-pref-tooltip-cx: Igu ogeysii tarjumaadahayga lagu sameeyay qalabka Tarjumaadda Mowduuca.
cx-notification-first-translation: Hambalyo tarjumaaddaadii ugu horreysay! Eeg waxqabadkaaga si aad u hesho bogag kale oo aad tarjunto.
cx-notification-tenth-translation: Hambalyo tarjumaaddaadii tobnaad! Waxaad noqonaysaa turjumaan khubaro ah. Sii wad shaqadaada wanaagsan!
cx-notification-hundredth-translation: Waxaad hadda samaysay 100 tarjumaadood! Taasi waa guul cajiib ah. La wadaag warkan tifaftirayaasha kale.
cx-notification-deleted-draft: Tarjumaadaadii $1 waa la tuuray sababtoo ah qoraalkeeda ayaa muddo ka badan hal sano duugoobay. Waqti kasta oo aad rabto waxaad ku bilaabi kartaa tarjumaad cusub oo wadata qoraal cusub.
cx-notification-deleted-draft-bundle: {{PLURAL:$1|$1 tarjumaadaha}} ayaa la tuuray sababtoo ah nuxurkooda ayaa duugobay muddo ka badan hal sano. Waxaad ku billoobi kartaa nuxur cusub wakhti kasta.
cx-notification-continue-translation: Waxaad billowday tarjumaadda $1 bilo ka hor. Tixgeli inaad daabacdo ka hor inta aan si toos ah loo tuurin sannad ka dib.
cx-notification-continue-translation-bun: Waxaad billowday {{PLURAL:$1|$1 tarjumaadood}} bilo ka hor. Tixgeli inaad daabacdo ka hor inta aan si toos ah loo tuurin sannad ka dib.
cx-draft-restored: Tarjumaaddii la kaydiyay waa la soo raray.
cx-notification-suggestions-available: Iyada oo ku saleysan {{GENDER:$2|tarjumaadaadii}} hore ee '''$1''', talooyin cusub ayaa hadda diyaar ah.
cx-infobar-cannot-publish: Tarjumaaddaada lama daabici karo sababtoo ah daabacaadda waxaa loo oggol yahay oo keliya tifaftirayaasha khibradda u leh wiki-gan.
cx-infobar-old-version: Turjumaaddan waxay ku salaysan tahay nooc hore oo nuxurka ah. Bogga asalka ah waxaa laga yaabaa inuu si weyn isu beddelay, waxaadna u baahan kartaa inaad dib u billowdo turjumaadda.
cx-tools-linter-generic-title: Waxaa jira dhibaato ku saabsan tarjumaaddaada
cx-tools-linter-abuse-filter: Ilaalada kharibaadda ayaa aqoonsaday nuxur dhibaato leh oo ku jira turjumaaddaada
cx-tools-linter-empty-title: Turjumaaddaadu waxay u baahan tahay cinwaan
cx-tools-linter-invalid-character: Cinwaanka turjumaadaada waxaa ku jira xarfo aan ansax ahayn
cx-tools-linter-page-exists-message:
Bog wata cinwaanka $1 mar hore ayuu jiraa. Daabacaadda turjumaadaada waxay tirtiri doontaa nuxurka jira

Hubi inay caadi tahay in la beddelo bogga jira, ama ka fiirso inaad dib u magacawdo turjumaadaada.
cx-tools-linter-cannot-publish-title: Daabacaadda waxaa loo oggol yahay oo keliya isticmaalayaasha khibradda u leh
cx-tools-linter-cannot-publish-message:
Bulshadan waxay go'aansatay inay u xaddiddo daabacaadda turjumaadaha oo keliya tifaftirayaasha khibradda leh. Ma daabici kartid turjumaaddan ilaa aad khibrad dheeraad ah ka helayso wax-ka-beddelka wiki-gan, laakiin waxaad samayn kartaa:
  • Inaad u daabacdo turjumaadaada sidii qabyo-qoraal, ka dibna aad isticmaasho agabka caadiga ah ee wax ka beddelka si aad u abuurto maqaalka.
  • Inaad maqaalkan u turjunto luuqad kale oo aan lahayn xaddidaaddan.
cx-tools-linter-cannot-publish-action-la: U deji in lagu daabaco qabyo ahaan
cx-tools-linter-template-block-message:
Bogga asalka ah wuxuu adeegsadaa template aan laga helin wiki-ga la doonayo.

Template-kan waa la iska dhaafay, laakiin waxaad ku dari kartaa nuxur cusub si aad u qabsato xogta ka maqan.
cx-tools-linter-template-inline-message:
Bogga asalka ah wuxuu adeegsadaa tusmada si uu u habeeyo nuxurka, laakiin qaar ka mid ah tusmadaas kuma jiraan wiki-ga la beegsanayo.

Nuxurka ka yimid tusmada maqan waxaa lagu daray qoraal caadi ah. Fadlan hubi natiijada.
cx-tools-linter-old-revision: Turjumaaddu waxay ku salaysan tahay noocii hore ee bogga
cx-tools-linter-old-revision-message:
Turjumaaddu waxay ku salaysan tahay nooc hore oo nuxurka ah. Bogga asalka ah waxa laga yaabaa inuu [$1 si weyn isu beddelay].

Waxaad sii wadi kartaa turjumaaddan, ama dib u bilaabi kartaa si aad u isticmaasho nuxurka la cusboonaysiiyay. Haddii aad dib u bilowdo turjumaadda, isbeddelladaada hadda way lumi doonaan.
cx-tools-linter-restart-translation-mess: Waxaad bilaabi doontaa turjumaad cusub oo ku salaysan noocii ugu dambeeyay ee bogga. Dhammaan isbeddelladaada waa lumi doonaan.

cx-publish-destination-namespace-user-de: Hoos meel magacaaga isticmaalaha si aad u hagaajiso
cx-publish-destination-namespace-draft-d: Meel magaca qabyo qoraalka si bulshada u dib u eegto oo u hagaajiso
cx-publish-destination-namespace-changed: Meesha daabacaadda waxaa loo beddelay qabyo shaqsiyeed. Waxaad mar kasta sii hagaajin kartaa dejinta daabacaadda
cx-mt-abuse-publish-error: Turjumaadda lama daabici karo sababtoo ah waxaa ku jira qoraal aad u badan oo aan wax laga beddelin.
cx-unreviewed-translation-category: Bogag leh turjumaado aan weli dib loo eegin
cx-unreviewed-translation-category-desc: Bogag lagu turjumay aaladda Turjumaadda Mawduuca oo leh tiro badan oo nuxur aan weli la dib u eegin
cx-preference-enable-entrypoints: Helitaanka [[$1|bilow turjumaad]] waxaa laga heli karaa bogga wax ku biirinta, liiska luqadaha, iyo marka bogag cusub la abuurayo.
cx-sx-section-selector-desc: Waxaad isbarbar dhigi doontaa nuxurka labada luuqadood

Isku day bog kale ama luqado kale oo kala duwan
cx-sx-section-selector-automatic-section: Qaybaha si otomaatig ah ayaa loo aqoonsadaa, natiijooyinkuna mar walba sax ma aha.
cx-sx-section-selector-unsupported-secti: Qaar ka mid ah qaybaha ayaa laga yaabaa inaysan ku muuqan liiska sababtoo ah nuxurkooda weli lama taageerin.
cx-sx-content-comparator-review-contents: Nuxurka qaybta waxaa laga yaabaa in hore loogu daboolay maqaalka la beegsanayo.
sx-quick-tutorial-secondary-point-step-1: Turjun oo hal qayb mar kasta daabac. Waa fudud, degdeg ah, oo madadaalo leh!
sx-quick-tutorial-secondary-point-step-2: Turjumaadaha la soo jeediyay waxay u baahan yihiin dib u eegistaada si ay si dabiici ah u noqdaan kuwo si fiican loo akhriyo.
cx-sx-sentence-selector-suggested-transl: Turjumaad la soo jeediyay oo ka timid $1
cx-sx-content-comparator-mapped-section-: Turjumaaddaada waxay ballaarin doontaa qaybta jirta. Ka tirtir haddii qaybuhu aysan isku xiriirnayn.
cx-sx-content-comparator-discarded-secti: Turjumaaddaada waxaa loo daabici doonaa sidii qayb cusub oo madax-bannaan.

Marka la daabacayo waxaad go’aansan kartaa inaad beddesho nuxurka jira.

cx-sx-publish-summary: Abuuray iyadoo la turjumay qaybta "$1" ee bogga "$2"
cx-sx-publish-lead-section-summary: Abuuray iyadoo la turjumay qaybta furitaanka ee bogga "$1"
cx-sx-publisher-lead-section-option-deta: Ku samee bog cusub qaybta meel magaca
cx-sx-publisher-sandbox-option-details: Ku daabac meelahaaga gaarka ah si aad u dib u eegto oo aad meel kale ugu nuqulato.
cx-sx-sentence-selector-translated-segme: Wax ka beddel laguma samayn adiga
cx-sx-published-section-confirmation-con: Turjumaaddaada waa la daabacay. Ka fiirso inaad sii saxdo nuxurka ama ku darto qayb kale.
cx-sx-publisher-mt-abuse-message-title: Turjumaaddaada waxaa ku jira $1% oo qoraal aan la beddelin
cx-sx-publisher-mt-abuse-error-title: Turjumaaddaada lama daabici karo: waxaa ku jira $1% oo qoraal aan la beddelin
cx-sx-publisher-mt-abuse-message-body: Turjumaadda mashiinka waa bilow kaliya. Weli waad daabici kartaa, laakiin hubi in turjumaaddaadu si dabiici ah ugu socoto luqaddaada.
cx-sx-publisher-mt-abuse-error-body: Turjumaadda mashiinka waa bilow kaliya. Hubi in turjumaaddaadu si dabiici ah ugu akhrisanayso luqaddaada.
cx-sx-article-search-no-suggestions-mess: Ka fikir mawduuc kasta oo aad xiisaynayso. Uma baahnid inaad noqoto khabiir si aad u abuurto turjumaad wanaagsan.
cx-sx-translation-confirmer-action-messa: Ku ballaari $1 ama hubi qaybaha hore u jira
Ma jiraan qaybo maqan. Hubi kuwa jira.
cx-campaign-mflanguagesearcher-invite: Waxaad turjumi kartaa boggan. Waa hab fudud oo lagu abuuro nuxur luqaddaada.
sx-recent-translation-entrypoint-dialog-: Turjumaadaha waxay dib u isticmaalaan shaqo ay sameeyeen tifaftirayaal luqado kale ah. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, qaybo qaar ayaa laga yaabaa inay ku lumaan turjumaadda. Waad caawin kartaa:
Ka dhig nuxurka mid si dabiici ah loo akhriyo
Wax ka beddel jumladaha adigoo dib u habeynaya ama beddelaya erayada sida loo baahdo.
Akhristayaashu waxay galaan tixraacyo si ay u hubiyaan xaqiiqooyinka. Dib u eeg qaabka tixraacyada kuna dar tixraacyo ku habboon luuqaddaada.
Hubi in macnaha asalka ah aan lagu beddelin turjumaadda.
Ku ballaari boggan adigoo turjumaya qaybaha ku jira luqadaha kale ee aad taqaan.
sx-block-template-adaptation-card-edit-b: Dib u eeg oo wax ka beddel turjumaadda
sx-block-template-adaptation-card-body-h: Tusmada u dhigma lama heli karo $1
cx-uls-relevant-languages-panel-message: Boggan kuma jiro qaar ka mid ah luuqadaha aad taqaan. Waxaad ku turjumi kartaa daqiiqado gudahood!
cx-sx-publisher-publish-panel-lead-secti: Tani waxay noqon doontaa qaybta ugu horreysa ee maqaalka cusub!
sx-recent-edit-entrypoint-top-banner-con: Qayb aad dhawaan ku tafatirtay $1 kuma jirto $2. Ka fiirso inaad turjunto.
cx-contributecard-entrypoint-desc: Turjun hal qayb ama maqaal dhan. Ka dhig waxyaabo badan oo la heli karo luqado badan.
cx-sx-block-template-mapping-status-titl: Tusmadaan waa lagu dari doonaa isagoo madhan
Tusmadaan qayb ahaan waa la turjumi karaa
Tusmadaan si otomaatig ah ayaa loo turjumi karaa
cx-sx-block-template-mapping-status-expl: Qaab dhismeedka tusmada labada liuqadood aad buu u kala duwan yahay, mana jirto xog si otomaatig ah loo wareejin karo
Qaab dhismeedka tusmada labada luqadood waa isku mid, waxaana si otomaatig ah loo wareejin karaa xog qaar
Qaab dhismeedka tusmada labada luqadood waa isku mid, dhammaan xogtana si otomaatig ah ayaa loo wareejin karaa
cx-sx-block-template-no-equivalent-templ: Haddii aad taqaanid tusmo u dhiganta oo ku jirta $1, waxaad ku xiriirin kartaa Wikidata si aaladuhu u heli karaan.
cx-sx-block-template-none-mapped-param-t: Wax xuduudo ah oo ka yimid $1 laguma darin tusmadii asalka ahaa
cx-sx-block-template-mapped-params-text: $1 ayaa laga soo daray {{PLURAL:$2|$2 xuduud|$2 xuduudo}} ee tusmadii asalka ahaa
cx-sx-block-template-no-source-params-te: Tusmada asalka ahaa ma lahayn xuduudo la wareejin karo
cx-sx-block-template-missing-mandatory-p: $1 xuduudood oo khasab ah ayaan weli laga buuxin tusmada ku jira $2. Wax ka beddel tusmada si gacanta loogu buuxiyo
cx-sx-block-template-missing-optional-pa: $1 xuduudood oo dheeraad ah ayaa lagu buuxin karaa tusmada ku jira $2. Wax ka beddel tusmada si gacanta loogu buuxiyo
cx-sx-dashboard-help-panel-title: Ma u baahan tahay caawimo turjumaad?
cx-sx-dashboard-help-panel-more-info-lab: Wax badan oo ku saabsan qalabkan
sx-confirm-back-navigation-dialog-body:
Isbeddellada weli lama keydin waxaana laga yaabaa inay lumiyaan.
Waxaad sii wadi kartaa tafatirka si isbeddellada si toos ah loo keydiyo.
cx-sx-login-dialog-body: Isbeddelladaada lama keydin karo lagumana xiriirin karo akoonkaaga ilaa aad mar kale ka gasho daaqad kale
sx-confirm-translation-deletion-dialog-b: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad si joogto ah u tirtirto turjumaaddan?
sx-confirm-draft-translation-start-dialo: Sii wad turjumaadda boggan ee mobilka
Turjumaaddan waxaa laga bilaabay qalab kale, waxayna ka kooban tahay nuxur qaybaha badan ee maqaalka.
Mobilka waxaad mar kaliya ka shaqayn kartaa hal qayb. Sidaa darteed, kaliya qaybta ugu muhiimsan ayaa la rari doonaa hadda.

Ha welwelin. Qaybaha haray ma lumin. Waxay hadda ku jiraan liiska turjumaadahaaga socda, waxaana loo adeegsan karaa in lagu ballaariyo maqaalka jira. Waxaad heli doontaa turjumaad cusub oo socda oo ay ku jiraan nuxurka qayb kasta.
cx-mflanguagesearcher-entrypoint-card-de: Habka tarjumaadda tallaabo-tallaabo ah ee lagu abuuro bog cusub luuqaddaada.
mint-mflanguagesearcher-entrypoint-card-: Akhri turjumaad si toos ah loo sameeyay
Hordhaca si toos ah loo sameeyay oo ah waxa ku jira luuqadaha kale si aad u eegto una saxdo.
cx-unreviewed-translation-dialog-title: Dib u eeg turjumaaddii ugu dambeyay
cx-unreviewed-translation-dialog-body: Ka dib markaad dhammaystirto turjumaad degdeg ah waxaad u baahan tahay inaad sugto 10 daqiiqo ka hor inta aanad bilaabin mid cusub. Fadlan dib u eeg shaqadii hore muddadan, maadaama nuxurka tayada leh ay qiimeeyaan bulshada tifaftirayaashu.
